title: Partial read-only root vs general write permission
stakeholder_intent: The root filesystem is read-only per container policy.
formalized_policy: Write access to /var is allowed for application logs and runtime state.
implementation_claim: Write access to /var is allowed for application logs and runtime state.
expected_issue: Structural diff does not flag this pair: intent extracts partial readonly_root_fs (not in the STRICT weakening lattice), while Z3 finds that write_allowed permits fs_write outside /tmp — violating the intent's partial read-only encoding. Triangulation agreement is no: structural silent, Z3 fails.
